does_not_prove: Semantic correctness of the cited source.
proves: Tau CLI can produce tau.external_research_receipt.v1 from explicit source evidence.
The produced stdout JSON and written receipt file match exactly.

command: uv run tau external-research-receipt --query "latest Chutes pricing" --method brave-search --retrieved-at 2026-06-28T02:20:00Z --summary "Producer proof receipt from explicit source evidence. This is not live Brave Search output." --source "Chutes pricing|https://chutes.ai/pricing" --output experiments/goal-locked-subagents/proofs/external-research-receipt-producer-20260628T022000Z/receipt.json
